title: My reaction to Wonchopmonkeyman liking my previous Poop I uploaded yesterday
description:
This is pretty much a rehash of a scene from the sonic shorts poop, only with fixed framerate and wonchop's head. How many pics can you find in here?
Indestructable
Determination that is incorruptable
From the other side a terror to behold
Annihilation will be unavoidable
Every broken enemy will know,
That their opponent had to be invincible
Take a last look around,while you're alive
I'M AN INDESTRUCTABLE
MASTER OF WAAAAAAAAAAAAARRRRR
